8.reason: [The function 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; many compilers (especially in C11 and later) remove it entirely, causing a compilation error. Use 'fgets' instead.]

49.reason: ['itoa' is not part of the standard C library and may not be available on all compilers (e.g., GCC on Linux), leading to a compilation error. Use 'sprintf' instead.]
